PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Wedding Banners for Reception & Ceremony Display

Make the most of your special day with an eye-catching custom wedding banner. From wedding receptions and ceremony backdrops to engagement parties and bridal showers, we can help you create unforgettable memories with our professionally designed custom wedding banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a wedding banner that you're proud to display. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks.

Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of wedding banner printing and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made wedding banner. If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We offer a wide selection of custom wedding banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your wedding banner is delivered when you need it.

Why Choose Our Wedding Banners?

Your wedding banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All wedding banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of wedding banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance).

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Wedding Banner Material for Indoor & Outdoor Celebrations

Choose from six customizable wedding banner materials designed for both indoor and outdoor celebrations:

Premium Vinyl Wedding Banners - Our most popular choice for wedding ceremonies and receptions. Features weather-resistant vinyl construction perfect for outdoor celebrations while maintaining vibrant colors for indoor displays.

Fabric Wedding Banners - Elegant fabric construction ideal for sophisticated wedding receptions and formal ceremonies. Provides a premium appearance with excellent color reproduction.

Mesh Wedding Banners - Wind-resistant design perfect for outdoor wedding ceremonies in windy conditions. The mesh construction allows air flow while maintaining display quality.

All wedding banner materials are printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that complement your wedding theme. Every banner is manufactured and printed in the USA to ensure consistent quality for your special day.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Wedding Banner Installation

Select the perfect finishing options for your wedding banner display needs:

Grommets - Reinforced metal grommets provide secure hanging points for wedding ceremony backdrops and reception displays. Ideal for rope or bungee cord installation.

Pole Pockets - Sewn pole pockets allow easy installation on poles or stands for wedding ceremony entrances and reception areas.

Hem & Grommets - Reinforced hem with grommets provides maximum durability for outdoor wedding celebrations and windy conditions.

Adhesive Backing - Permanent or removable adhesive options available for smooth surface application on walls, windows, or wedding venue fixtures.

All finishing options are designed to ensure your wedding banner displays securely throughout your celebration while maintaining a professional appearance that complements your wedding décor.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Wedding Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We understand timing is crucial for your wedding celebration. Choose from multiple production options to ensure your custom wedding banner arrives when you need it:

Standard Production - 3-5 business days production time for custom wedding banners. Perfect for advance wedding planning with reliable delivery timing.

Rush Production - 1-2 business day production available for last-minute wedding banner needs or tight celebration timelines.

Same Day Production - Available for select wedding banner sizes and materials when ordered before specified cutoff times.

Production times begin after artwork approval and payment processing. Our team will review your wedding banner design for print quality and contact you immediately if any adjustments are needed to ensure your banner meets our quality standards.

All wedding banners undergo quality inspection before shipping to guarantee your banner arrives ready for your special celebration.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Wedding Banner Payment & Ordering Options

We offer flexible payment options to accommodate your wedding budget and planning needs:

Credit Card Payment - Accept all major credit cards for immediate wedding banner order processing and fastest production turnaround.

PayPal - Secure PayPal payment processing available for convenient online wedding banner ordering.

Purchase Orders - Net payment terms available for wedding venues, event planners, and qualified business accounts.

Custom Quote Options - Special pricing available for large quantity wedding banner orders, unique sizes, or bulk event planning needs.

All wedding banner orders are processed securely with immediate order confirmation and tracking information provided. Our customer service team is available Monday-Friday 8AM-4PM CST to assist with any payment questions or wedding banner order support.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Wedding Banner Delivery

Reliable shipping options to ensure your wedding banner arrives on time for your celebration:

Standard Shipping - Ground delivery for wedding banners with tracking information provided. Ideal for advance wedding planning with reliable delivery timing.

Expedited Shipping - 2-3 day delivery available for wedding banners when faster delivery is needed for your celebration timeline.

Overnight Shipping - Next day delivery available for rush wedding banner orders and last-minute celebration needs.

Important Shipping Notice: Due to the latest shipping regulations, all wedding banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your wedding banner folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

All wedding banner shipments include tracking information and delivery confirmation. Our customer service team can provide shipping updates and coordinate special delivery requirements for your wedding venue.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Indoor & Outdoor Wedding Uses for Custom Banners

Custom wedding banners enhance every aspect of your celebration with professional displays:

Wedding Ceremony Backdrops - Create stunning focal points behind the altar or ceremony area with personalized wedding banners featuring your names, date, and custom designs.

Reception Entrance Displays - Welcome guests with elegant wedding banners at reception venue entrances, featuring your wedding theme and celebration details.

Photo Booth Backgrounds - Custom wedding banners provide perfect backdrops for wedding photo booths and guest photography areas.

Dance Floor Displays - Personalized wedding banners above dance floors create memorable focal points for wedding reception entertainment.

Engagement Party Banners - Celebrate your engagement with custom banners perfect for engagement parties and pre-wedding celebrations.

Bridal Shower Displays - Custom banners enhance bridal shower décor with personalized designs matching your wedding theme.

Outdoor Wedding Installations - Weather-resistant wedding banners perfect for garden ceremonies, beach weddings, and outdoor celebration venues.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Wedding Banner Artwork Requirements for Custom Printing

Ensure your wedding banner prints with professional quality by following these artwork specifications:

File Format Requirements - Submit wedding banner artwork in high-resolution PDF, AI, EPS, or PSD formats for best printing results.

Resolution Guidelines - Provide artwork at 150 DPI minimum for wedding banners. Higher resolution files ensure crisp text and clear imagery for your celebration.

Color Specifications - CMYK color mode recommended for wedding banner printing. RGB files will be converted and may result in slight color variations.

Text and Font Guidelines - Ensure all text is outlined or fonts are embedded. Minimum text size of 1 inch for optimal readability on wedding banners.

Design Layout - Include 0.25" bleed area around wedding banner artwork. Keep important text and design elements at least 1" from banner edges.

Professional Design Services - Our in-house graphic designers can create custom wedding banner artwork or modify your existing designs to ensure optimal printing results.

Our design team will review your wedding banner artwork for print quality and contact you immediately if any adjustments are needed to ensure your banner meets our quality standards.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Your Custom Wedding Banner Online

Ready to create the perfect wedding banner for your special celebration? Our easy online ordering process makes it simple to design and order custom wedding banners that perfectly complement your wedding theme.

Choose from unlimited design options in our online designer tool, or upload your own custom wedding artwork. With sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50' and multiple production time options, we'll ensure your wedding banner is ready when you need it.

Get started on your wedding banner order today. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our in-house customer support team at (320) 391-5300.

Looking for something more specific? We can provide custom quotes for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders - ideal for wedding venues and event planners.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Wedding Banner FAQ

Are wedding banners waterproof for outdoor ceremonies?

Our premium vinyl wedding banners are weather-resistant and suitable for outdoor wedding ceremonies. They can withstand light rain and outdoor conditions, making them perfect for garden weddings and outdoor celebrations.

How do I hang my wedding banner?

Wedding banner hanging options depend on your chosen finishing. Grommets work well with rope or bungee cords for ceremony backdrops. Pole pockets slide easily onto poles or stands for reception displays. Our customer service team can recommend the best hanging method for your wedding venue.

Can I order a double-sided wedding banner?

Yes, we offer double-sided wedding banners perfect for ceremony installations where guests will view the banner from both sides. Double-sided printing ensures your wedding message is visible from all angles.

How durable are custom wedding banners?

Our wedding banners are printed on premium vinyl material designed to last throughout your celebration and beyond. With proper care, your wedding banner can serve as a lasting keepsake of your special day.

Can I customize wedding banners with my own design?

Absolutely! You can upload your own wedding artwork or use our online designer to create custom wedding banners. Our in-house design team can also assist with creating or modifying designs to ensure perfect results for your celebration.

How quickly can I receive my wedding banner after ordering?

Production times vary from same-day to 3-5 business days depending on your selected option. Add shipping time based on your chosen delivery method. Rush production and expedited shipping are available for tight wedding timelines.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
